posts.author: Verus (mark@verusmetrology.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We have a Kanban view that is the most used view on our board. When you open a card down the left hand side are all the columns. I would like the option to be able to hide some of these at the least and a bonus would be to able to rearrange them and add dividers without moving their position on the main table.

What are you trying to achieve

Hide/edit the kanban card left hand side when it opens so not all main table columns are visible.
